## Summary

Describe the change.

## Verification

Run the relevant commands and check the boxes:

- [ ] `swift build`
- [ ] `./build.sh`
- [ ] `bash scripts/verify-upload-retry.sh`
- [ ] `bash scripts/verify-retention-cleanup.sh`

## Privacy Review

- [ ] No real recordings committed.
- [ ] No real `metadata.json`, `upload.log`, `feishu_minutes.json`, transcript, or summary files committed.
- [ ] No real Feishu tenant URL, `file_token`, `minute_token`, or `minute_url` committed.
- [ ] No signing certificates, private keys, or keychains committed.

## Notes

Mention any manual audio, route, or Feishu tests that were run.
